basics.name: Arun Gopi
basics.headline: Healthcare RCM Leader & Data Analytics Specialist

summary: Strategic Healthcare Revenue Cycle (RCM) leader and data analytics specialist with 18+ years of experience, including 7+ years supporting US healthcare processes.
Certified AI Medical Coder (CAIMC®) with expertise in professional billing, home health billing, hospice billing, and ABA billing.
Experienced in medical billing (UB-04, CMS-1500), coding (CPT, ICD-10, HCPCS), denial management (CARC/RARC), and AR follow-up.
Focused on reducing AR aging, improving collections, and ensuring compliance with CMS and HIPAA regulations.
Skilled in Power BI, Microsoft Fabric, SQL, and Python for healthcare analytics and reporting.

experience.title: Manager – Billing Operations & Healthcare Analytics
highlights: Managed full-cycle US healthcare RCM operations including ABA billing.
Handled charge capture, claims submission, AR follow-up, and denial management.
Built 15+ Power BI dashboards for AR, denial rates, and payer performance.
Developed ETL pipelines using Python and SQL, reducing manual reporting by 40%.
Improved clean claim rate and first-pass resolution.
Led process improvements and team productivity initiatives.

experience.title: Manager – Revenue Cycle Operations
highlights: Managed end-to-end RCM including professional, home health, and hospice billing.
Handled eligibility, charge entry, claims submission, and AR follow-up.
Led denial management using CARC/RARC codes.
Improved collections through analytics and root cause analysis.
Managed a team of 40+ and improved SLA adherence.

certifications.name: Microsoft Certified: Fabric Analytics Engineer Associate

projects.name: Healthcare RCM Analytics Platform
projects.description: Built centralized analytics solution integrating claims, payments, and AR datasets with real-time KPI tracking.

projects.name: Power BI Embedded Healthcare Dashboard
projects.description: Developed dashboards for denial analysis, payer performance, and revenue trends.

achievements: Recovered $90K in underbilled revenue through analytics-driven claim audits.
Reduced aged AR by resolving $104K in Medicaid claims.
Led QMS implementation aligned with ISO standards, improving audit readiness.
